text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins today, and in order to
conquer the autumn Tenno Sho and Arima Kinen
races, it's going to be an intensive one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready, Trainer? The types of training
available exclusively in the summer are
comparable to the number of stars in space!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Time is short, so make sure you plan out an
effective training regimen for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to last year, Agnes Tachyon has turned
over a new leaf and is taking training seriously!
